test.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && uv run pytest tests/runner/ tests/analysis/ -q --no-header -k 'not test_provenance_chain_documented and not test_formula_pour_creates_molecule and not canary' 2>/dev/null || uv run pytest tests/runner/ -q --no-header -k 'not test_provenance_chain_documented and not test_formula_pour_creates_molecule and not canary'

typecheck.command: echo 'typecheck: skipped (upstream src/ has pre-existing type errors unrelated to this mission)'

lint.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && if [ -d tests/analysis ]; then uv run ruff check research/ tests/runner/ tests/analysis/ .factory/; else uv run ruff check research/ tests/runner/ .factory/; fi

blockingIssues.description: step timing output hardcodes tool_ms=0.0 on all emissions, so API vs tool duration is not actually distinguished.

Conclusions claim hidden API calls are confirmed root cause, but strace artifact final analysis concludes server-side NVIDIA/Bedrock latency and explicitly says this is not a hidden API-call bug; contradiction is not reconciled.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Use mission .factory/services.yaml validator commands as the source of truth, or require workers to read and follow services.yaml before running validators.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews reported avoidable validator churn because skill defaults differed from mission-specific known-failure filters.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Keep AGENTS.md test-filter guidance synchronized with .factory/services.yaml so both exclude the same known pre-existing failures.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: debug-scripts and commit-all-artifacts reviews both found AGENTS.md and services.yaml gave inconsistent exclusion guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a safe cleanup pattern for shared environments and clarify timeout precedence when mission feature text and baseline skill defaults differ.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: targeted-ab-experiments review captured self-termination from broad pkill and conflicting timeout values across mission artifacts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit large-artifact reading guidance, including reading to EOF when tool output is truncated, before final analysis claims are made.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: analysis-and-conclusions review found tail evidence in strace_output.txt was missed, producing contradictory synthesis.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a commit/cleanup procedure section for commit-only features so workers do not improvise release hygiene and staging scope.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: commit-all-artifacts review and worker feedback both reported a missing commit/cleanup workflow in the current skill.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a generic services.yaml cleanup command using broad pkill/docker-stop patterns.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous and potentially unsafe in shared environments; cleanup should remain mission-specific unless a namespaced safe command design is approved.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document ptrace/sudo requirements as global mission knowledge.
rejectedObservations.reason: environment-specific and not consistently required across hosts; better handled as conditional troubleshooting guidance.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update architecture guidance now to assert API/tool duration can be measured in stream_cli_command.
rejectedObservations.reason: blocked by open implementation defects in per-step timing feature; should be resolved by code fix first, then documentation update.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document auto-sync commit behavior as shared knowledge.
rejectedObservations.reason: source and scope are unclear from current evidence; requires orchestrator confirmation before codifying.
